metadata_mapping.scene_title: window.xv.conf.dyn.video_title OR html5player.setVideoTitle(...) OR JSON-LD VideoObject.name
metadata_mapping.cover_image: JSON-LD VideoObject.thumbnailUrl[0] OR html5player.setThumbUrl169(...) OR og:image
metadata_mapping.performers: primary uploader/profile link in page metadata; window.xv.conf.dyn.video_models may be empty
metadata_mapping.studio: html5player.setSponsors(...) - usually false for amateur content

search_strategy.notes: GET https://www.xvideos.com/?k=<query> returns paginated HTML listings with scene URL, title, thumbnail, and uploader profile link.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare detected on public pages during validation.
Standard browser-grade headers (User-Agent, Accept-Language) were sufficient.
Keep requests conservative if extending search pagination.
known_limitations: video_models is frequently empty on amateur or uploader-driven pages.
Performer pages use /profiles/ not a dedicated pornstar route for uploader content.
Signed CDN media URLs expire; do not store raw stream URLs.
Search results return listing metadata only and require scene scraping for full details.
